summary: Implemented TASK-027: Wrote comprehensive LLM provider integration tests with mocked responses. Added 3 new test files (end-to-end-workflows, streaming-edge-cases, provider-failover) with 117 new tests covering full lifecycle workflows, Unicode/multibyte streaming, abort/cancellation, cross-provider failover, circuit breaker recovery, and concurrent streams. All 1114 tests pass (100% pass rate).
